yummy #junkfood #processedfood #sugar #slop ever have one of those days where you wake up thinking it’s going to be simple, calm, maybe even boring… and then the universe decides to roll out a full-on spectacle? Not a disaster. Not a tragedy. Just a slow, creeping chaos that nudges your plans off the table until all you can do is shrug and say, “Okay… let’s dance.” It’s like suddenly you’re the lead in a story you didn’t audition for. You were just trying to exist quietly, keep to your lane, maybe sip your coffee in peace. And then—bam—a whirlwind of people, events, and random coincidences crashes in. Everything ordinary turns loud, confusing, and somehow hilarious. There’s always that presence. The one that doesn’t leave, no matter how much you wish they would. Persistent, annoying, impossible to ignore. They challenge your patience, test your limits, make you laugh when you least expect it. And slowly, almost imperceptibly, they start to shift the world around you. Things feel lighter. Moments feel brighter. Walls you built begin to crumble. Then comes the unexpected twist. The one that doesn’t fit neatly into your plan, your comfort zone, your carefully curated life. They see past the surface—the tired, guarded exterior—and into the heart underneath. They don’t soften the chaos, they exist within it, and in doing so, force you to see yourself differently. Vulnerable, messy, real. It’s terrifying. It’s exhilarating. It’s alive. We all have our “safe corners,” spaces where the world feels predictable and quiet. But staying there too long? That’s not living. Growth waits in the interruptions, the detours, the moments that throw your day off balance. You don’t need to have a plan. You just need to keep showing up, keep opening doors, keep letting the story surprise you. Life isn’t linear. It’s a winding path of unexpected encounters, awkward coincidences, and loud, uninvited chaos. Some pass through and leave only echoes. Others stay long enough to shift the story, maybe even change it. And all of it—the frustration, the wonder, the laughter, the heartbreak—is yours. It shapes the narrative that only you can tell. So if today feels like a musical number you didn’t ask for, remember: you don’t need everything neat, perfect, or polished. You just need to move forward, to stumble, to dance a little, to let the interruptions in. Because in that chaos, in the mess, in the unplanned moments… that’s where you find the parts of yourself you didn’t know were waiting. And maybe, somewhere in all of it, you discover the story that’s truly yours—wild, imperfect, messy, and unforgettable. #targetaudience

#ad 저장!!✅ ㄹㅇ 아무도모르는 올영추천템!  어쩌다보니 올영에 없었는데(?) 새로 입점된 제품 여러개 소개해줬는데!!😖❤️ 🌷레노아는 진짜 빨래할 때 꼭 넣어봐!! 세일하면 가격도 다이소급이여서, 부담없이 써보는거 추천하구 날씨 한숨나오는 요즘ㅠㅠ 뭘 발라도 피부 애매~하면 세포랩 딱 첫단계에 써봐!!🫧 딱 세수 하자마자 요거 바르면 진짜 속수분만 딱!! 깔끔하게 잡히는데, 요거 위에 다른 스킨케어 올리면 그 제품 효과도 커진대!! 👉🏻 요건 올리브영에서 5/24 단 하루, 29,900원에 판매하니까 꼭 세일할 때 입문 추천!! 👩🏻‍🦰 리필드는 몇번이나!! 추천해 준 제품인데, 더워지면 진짜 진가를 발휘하는..<3 난 머리 다 마르기 전에!! 사용해주고, 두피까지 꼼꼼히 말려주는게 제일 떡 안지고 좋더라구!! 요것도 기다렸다가 올영세일 때 구매 추천🌟 #세포랩 #바이오제닉에센스블렌디드포뮬라 #화잘먹에센스 #촉촉결광에센스 #올리브영에센스

In the One Piece Episode 1163, titled “I Want You to Praise Me - The Reunion of Robin and Saul,” One Piece delivered one of the most emotional reunions in the entire series as Robin finally reunited with Saul after 22 years of pain, loneliness, and survival. The little girl who once lost everything in Ohara finally broke down in tears in front of the man who first told her she deserved to live. When Robin asked, “Can you praise me for holding out this long?”, it felt like decades of heartbreak and silent suffering came pouring out at once. Seeing the Straw Hats cry beside her while Saul stood there alive again made this moment unforgettable for every One Piece fan.#onepiece1163 #robin #luffy #nicorobin #onepiece

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

#92i #makeup Le “92i makeup” fait référence à un style de maquillage inspiré de l’univers du rap français, surtout lié à Booba et à son label 92i (“92 International”, en référence au département des Hauts-de-Seine). Sur les réseaux sociaux, ce terme désigne un maquillage au style urbain et confiant : teint très net, contouring marqué, regard intense avec eyeliner ou faux cils, lèvres bien dessinées et une attitude sûre de soi. Ce n’est pas une technique officielle de maquillage, mais plutôt une esthétique inspirée du luxe, de la street culture et d’une image forte et assumée.

Recette brunch :  Recette pancakes :  - 135g farine  - 3 œufs  - 200 ml lait  - 45g sucre  - 1 sachet levure chimique  Fouetter les œufs le sucre et le lait et rajouter la farine tamisée et la levure bien mélanger jusqu’à ce qu’il n’y ait pas de grumeau.    Recette 12 cupcakes : - 150g de beurre pommade  - 150g de sucre en poudre  - 3 œufs  - 150g farine - 2 cac levure chimique  Fouetter le beurre et le sucre jusqu'à obtenir un mélange onctueux puis ajouter les œufs un par un et enfin rajouter la farine et la levure chimique. Remplir les caissettes au 3/4 puis enfourner 10 à 15 min selon le four à 180 degrés  Recette chantilly mascarpone :  - 350g mascarpone  - 40 cl crème fleurette minimum 30%  - 3 cas de sucre glace  - 1 gousse vanille  - 1 CAS arôme vanille  Placer les ustensiles et les ingrédients liquide 5/10 min au congélateur si possible, plus c’est frais, mieux c’est, tout mixer ensemble avec un fouet électrique
